title: Nice to Meet You! & Look, Kitties!
overview: Gal meets Dino. Dino meets ramen. Kitties meet Dino, much to Dino's dismay. Later, Mieharu enjoys a wholesome Christmas with Dino.

title: My Friend's Coming Over & I Ran Into Your Ex
overview: Yamada swings by to meet Dino and watch TV. Dino invites Kaede's ex in for a game of cards. Later, Shouta Aoi tries to prevent a recurring disaster from happening.

title: Goin' Shopping & Goin' Out and About
overview: Dino goes out on the town. Kaede asks her Senpai for help with Dino's diet. Later, Kaede and Dino teleport to the park for an outdoor adventure.

title: Stop Messing With My Tail! & Merry Christmas!
overview: Kaede gets creative with Dino's problematic tail. Kaede gets a special Christmas visit at work. Later, Dino meets comedian Hollywood Zakoshisyoh.

title: Happy New Year! & It's Time to Pay Our Respects to the Gods
overview: Kaede and Dino celebrate the New Year. Dino visits its very first shrine. Later, Dino goes camping by itself.

title: Let's Rent Something & Mikan are So Yummy
overview: Kaede and Dino rent movies to watch. Kaede's ex brings over mikan. Later, Dino and Kaede find ways to pass the time inside.

title: I'm Worried About You & Guy Talk
overview: When Kaede catches a cold, Dino tries to find a way to cheer her up. Kaede's ex invites Dino out for some guy talk. Later, Dino brings over a gaggle of comedians to brighten up Kaede's day.

title: It Eats More than Just Ramen & Time for a Birthday Party!
overview: Kaede's coworker struggles to invite Kaede over for dinner. The gang throws Dino a birthday party. Later, Dino and guest stars solve an egg-citing mystery.

title: That Was Kinda Scary & It Loves Going Back to Sleep!
overview: Kaede and Dino experience a terrifying blackout. Dino escapes to dreamland. Later, Dino makes Kaede's dreams come true.

title: We're Friends & Calligraphy Time
overview: Dino makes a feathered friend. Kaede and Yamada teach Dino about calligraphy. Later, Dino has a pawsitively purr-fect time with a lost cat.

title: Helloooo? & No Worries
overview: Kaede loses her phone. Dino makes some hard-earned cash and learns about utility bills. Later, Kaede and Dino go to the amusement park.

title: Going Out to Eat & So Peaceful~
overview: Yamada learns that Dino's a great listener. Dino and the gang have an eggcellent time chilling. Later, Dino reunites with an old friend and goes to the beach.
